question: Compare ASP.NET Web Forms, MVC, and Core architectures.

options: PreInit, Init, InitComplete, PreLoad, Load, PostBack events, Render

options: Early binding at compile time; late binding at runtime

options: SOAP for messaging, WSDL for description, UDDI for discovery
